overall.description: A first-person perspective clip from a narrative horror game, beginning inside a dimly lit cafe with a live musical performance, then transitioning through the exit to reveal a foggy, autumnal small-town street with a weathered wooden cafe building. The atmosphere shifts from intimate artificial lighting to a desolate, misty outdoor environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: intimate cafe interior with stage performance

agents.ego_description: standing among the tables watching the guitarist perform on stage

notable_agents.action: guitarist performing under the spotlight on stage

entered.detail: raised wooden stage illuminated by a single spotlight
warm yellow spotlight highlighting the performer
dark wooden paneling lining the interior walls
small round tables with seated patrons
dark doorway leading to the exterior, gradually becoming visible

segments.scene_description: Inside a dimly lit wooden cafe, the camera observes a guitarist performing on a spotlighted stage. Patrons sit at tables in the shadows while the camera slowly advances toward a doorway visible on the right side of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: doorway transition between interior and exterior

events.description: emerging from darkness into the foggy natural light of the exterior
passing through the open wooden door from the cafe interior to the outside

agents.ego_description: walking through the doorway, transitioning from the dark cafe to the foggy street outside

entered.detail: weathered blue-painted door frame with an open wooden door
gray weathered wooden shingles on the building exterior
small sign with text and graphics mounted on the exterior wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the cafe's exit, transitioning from the artificial darkness to the foggy daylight. The weathered wooden exterior and door frame come into view as the interior elements fade behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy small-town street corner with vintage cafe building

events.description: camera continues backing away to reveal the full corner building and surrounding street

agents.ego_description: stepping back from the entrance to observe the building facade and foggy street environment

entered.detail: two-story weathered wooden building with octagonal corner architecture
vertical sign reading 'CAFE' in bold letters with 'BAKERY' above it
wooden barrel with a plate on top near the entrance
white utility van parked on the street beside the building
yellow fire hydrant on the sidewalk corner
overhead utility wires stretching across the foggy street
trees with orange and red autumn foliage behind the building

segments.scene_description: Now outside, the camera reveals the full facade of the weathered wooden cafe building with its vintage signage. The foggy street is deserted except for a parked white van, with autumn trees and power lines visible through the mist as the camera continues to pull back.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, dimly lit interior of a cafe into a desolate, fog-shrouded autumnal street. It begins inside the wooden establishment, gliding past shadowed patrons toward a guitarist performing on a spotlighted stage before advancing toward a doorway on the right. As the camera passes through the exit, the artificial darkness of the room gives way to a muted, misty daylight that reveals the weathered texture of the door frame. The scene then expands to reveal the full facade of the wooden building and its vintage signage, pulling back to uncover a deserted street. Finally, the view opens further to show a lone parked white van, skeletal autumn trees, and power lines disappearing into the thick gray mist.
